skills.builder.header.title: Skills Builder
skills.builder.description: Find the right courses and programs that help you reach your goals.
learning.goal.prompt: What is the next step for you? (optional)
learning.goal.start_career: I want to start my career
learning.goal.advance_career: I want to advance my career
job.title.prompt: Find the career title that best matches your current role (optional)
job.title.input.placeholder.text: Search and select a job title
career.interest.prompt: What careers interest you? This will focus our recommendations on relevant skills (required)
career.interest.prompt.progressive: Choose a job from the categories for related skills and course recommendations
career.interest.input.placeholder.text: Select up to 3 new job titles
matches.found.success.alert: We found skills and courses that match your preferences!
matches.not.found.danger.alert: We were not able to retrieve recommendations at this time. Please try again later.
related.skills.heading: Related Skills
product.type.course.description: Find new interests and advance career opportunities
product.type.program.description: Series of courses for a deep understanding of a topic
product.type.executive_education.descrip: Expert-led, fully supported courses that build career-critical skills
product.type.degree.description: Online degree programs from top universities
